title: Line 11905 – Employment insurance maternity and parental benefits, and provincial parental insurance plan benefits - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 11905 – Employment insurance maternity and parental benefits, and provincial parental insurance plan benefits
Report the total of the following amounts on line 11905 of your return:
- employment insurance (EI) maternity and parental benefits from box 37 of your T4E slip
- provincial parental insurance plan (PPIP) benefits from box 36 of your T4E slip
These amounts are already included on line 11900 of your return so do not add them again when you calculate your total income on line 15000 of your return.

## Forms and publications
- Line 11900 – Employment insurance and other benefits
- Quebec Parental Insurance Plan

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
